'''fasawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:llyn|llyn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:llyn|llyn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fasawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæsæwæth|fæsæwæth]] || [[word:fæsæwæj|fæsæwæj]] || [[word:fæsæwæsh|fæsæwæsh]] || [[word:fæsæwæ|fæsæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasasawath|fasasawath]] || [[word:fasasawaj|fasasawaj]] || [[word:fasasawash|fasasawash]] || [[word:fasasawa|fasasawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasawath|fasawath]] || [[word:fasawaj|fasawaj]] || [[word:fasawash|fasawash]] || [[word:fasawa|fasawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasafwath|fasafwath]] || [[word:fasafwaj|fasafwaj]] || [[word:fasafwash|fasafwash]] || [[word:fasafwaf|fasafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fasawatha|fasawatha]] || [[word:fasawaja|fasawaja]] || [[word:fasawasha|fasawasha]] || [[word:fasawaka|fasawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fasawath|fasawath]] || [[word:fasawaj|fasawaj]] || [[word:fasawash|fasawash]] || [[word:fasawa|fasawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fasawathal|fasawathal]] || [[word:fasawajal|fasawajal]] || [[word:fasawashal|fasawashal]] || [[word:fasawakal|fasawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fasawathatha|fasawathatha]] || [[word:fasawajaja|fasawajaja]] || [[word:fasawashasha|fasawashasha]] || [[word:fasawaka|fasawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fasawathan|fasawathan]] || [[word:fasawajan|fasawajan]] || [[word:fasawashan|fasawashan]] || [[word:fasawakan|fasawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fasawathaoro|fasawathaoro]] || [[word:fasawajaoro|fasawajaoro]] || [[word:fasawashaoro|fasawashaoro]] || [[word:fasawakaoro|fasawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
